creator: Alexander Terp
description:
No built-in date parsing

  Had to shell out to date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" ... to convert a date string to an epoch timestamp. This is macOS-specific and would break on Linux. Given that Rad already has now() and parse_epoch(), a
  parse_date("2026-03-22", "YYYY-MM-DD") returning the same map structure would round out the time story nicely.
title: date parsing functionality
